title: Adult Character Roles
wikitext:
[]: Adult Character Roles?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jan 21, 2007 4:25 pm Does anybody think the adult characters in Evangelion (Misato, Ritsuko, Kaji, Gendo, etc) will play as important a role and have as much screentime as the pilots in this project? I'm curious what people think cause as far as the products and popular marketing for EVA goes it really seems to neglect the adult characters. Shinji, Asuka, Rei, and Kaworu (why so much Kaworu?) dominate the marketing of EVA. Hell, if I remember right in the manga version the adults characters have very little screen-er-page time. I've only read the manga once but I don't remember Ritsuko and Misato playing such a promiment role in the manga like they do in the anime (in the anime I think those two might have more screentime than Rei and Asuka- and they are wondeful characters!). Only adult I do remember doing something from the manga was Kaji. Sure in the new films I expect Gendo will still play a huge part with his limited dialogue and Misato will be there cause Gainax needs that demographic of fan service. BUT--- Since these movies will have less running time than the series does that mean such overlooked characters like Fuyutsuki and Ritsuko (who is never really featured in Evagear) will become simplified and put to the wayside for more Kaworu fangirlness and more Rei'isms? My hope is that they keep the same dynamic of the series with both age groups being equally promiment. That's one thing that made EVA for me. Just as much attention was given to the messed up adult characters as it was to the young pilots. I just hope the Rebuild series doesn't push the adults aside the films can strictly become the Shinji,Rei, Asuka, Kaworu powerhour. And am I the only one worried with the rumor of more Kaworu? He worked great in the anime for what he was but I don't know if it would work to have him so promiment in the series? I guess I was always more of a Touji loving guy myself than a yaoi fanboy.

[]: Re: Adult Character Roles?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 21, 2007 5:02 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I guess I was always more of a Touji loving guy myself than a yaoi fanboy.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Jan 21, 2007 5:03 pm well Asuka, Rei, and Shinji are popular because THEY'RE THE MAIN CHARACTERS!!!...Kaworu is popular because he is Bishounen... the Adults are not as important to the story as the kids...cept for maybe Misato...in a story about kids...you base all the adults from the kid's point of veiw...right?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 21, 2007 6:16 pm Techinally, Misato and Shinji are the "heroes of the story" but yeah, it would be interesting to see how this would be. I personally think it's gonna be more or less same like the anime: only focusing on the adults when the plot calls for it.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Jan 21, 2007 6:27 pm Gendo will definitely play a big role. Without Gendo we lose all of the crazy conspiracies part of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Wed Jan 24, 2007 11:49 am MaggotMaster wrote: Gendo will definitely play a big role. Without Gendo we lose all of the crazy conspiracies part of the series.
summary: []: Adult Character Roles?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jan 21, 2007 4:25 pm Does anybody think the adult characters in Evangelion (Misato, Ritsuko, Kaji, Gendo, etc) will play as important a role and have as much screentime as the pilots in this project? I'm curious what people think cause as far as the products and popular marketing for EVA goes it really seems to neglect the adult characters. Shinji, Asuka, Rei
